_doc: Per-image Gemini prompts for 12 Lead Magnet Ideas for Home Service. {palette} resolves at runtime.

cover.prompt:
Editorial book cover for a downloadable lead magnet PDF. Aspect: portrait, 3:4, US letter book cover proportions.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed under TEXT TO RENDER below. No other text. No font names. No instructions. No labels beyond what is listed.
2. Never render the words 'Inter', 'Inter Regular', 'Inter Display Bold', 'JetBrains Mono', 'sans serif', or any typography or font instruction inside the image.
3. Spell every rendered word exactly as written, character for character.
4. The icon-grid cells must NOT contain any text labels, captions, or words inside them. The icons are pure line-art shape only.

TEXT TO RENDER (exactly these pieces, nothing more):
A. Top-left small pill, uppercase, two words: FREE PLAYBOOK
B. Upper-third headline across two lines: line 1 reads '12 Lead Magnet Ideas', line 2 reads 'for Home Service'.
C. Subtitle inside a horizontal off-white translucent panel directly below the headline, one short line: HVAC. Roofing. Plumbing. Lawn. Pest. Electrical. Deck. Solar. Pool. Windows.
D. Bottom-left small wordmark: AI BrandFactory

CENTRAL VISUAL (this is the hero of the cover, fills the lower 60 percent of the cover):
A 4-column by 3-row grid of 12 small icon-cards arranged with even spacing. Each cell is a small rounded-rectangle card (roughly 1/5 the cover width per cell, with comfortable gutters between cells) containing a single stylized line-art icon centered inside.

The 12 cells contain these icons (all in pure off-white #FAF9FF line-art with thin bright cyan #06B6D4 inner accents, NO text labels inside any cell):

ROW 1 (top row, 4 cells):
- Cell 1: A simple calculator icon. Rectangular body with a small rectangular display at the top and a 3x3 grid of small button squares below. Clean line-art only.
- Cell 2: A circular question mark glyph inside a thin circular ring (representing the quiz format).
- Cell 3: A horizontal Gantt-style timeline with 4 small horizontal bars stacked vertically at slightly offset positions (representing the project timeline estimator).
- Cell 4: Two side-by-side rectangles with a small comparison arrow or balance scale shape between them (representing materials comparison).

ROW 2 (middle row, 4 cells):
- Cell 5: A small location-pin teardrop with a thin horizontal line beneath it suggesting a zip-code/permit document (the permit cheat sheet by zip).
- Cell 6: A vertical clipboard outline with 4 small horizontal lines inside, with small checkmark squares to the left of each line (the pre-project checklist).
- Cell 7: A simple rectangular worksheet outline with 3 columns and 4 rows of light grid lines (the vendor vetting worksheet).
- Cell 8: A 3x4 calendar grid icon, simple rectangular outline divided into cells (the maintenance calendar).

ROW 3 (bottom row, 4 cells):
- Cell 9: A magnifying-glass icon with a downward branching line beneath the lens, suggesting a diagnostic decision-tree branch (the troubleshooting diagnostic).
- Cell 10: A simple dollar-sign glyph inside a circular outline (the local rebate finder).
- Cell 11: An eye icon with a small upward arrow-or-reveal-line beneath it (the hidden cost reveal guide).
- Cell 12: A small leaf or simple snowflake-and-leaf duo glyph (the seasonal tip pack).

GRID STYLING:
- Each cell is a rounded rectangle with a thin bright cyan #06B6D4 outline at low opacity (about 40 percent).
- Cell fills are deep indigo with a very subtle off-white-translucent inner gradient to lift the icon.
- The icons themselves are off-white #FAF9FF line-art with bright cyan accent strokes only on the small detail elements (calculator buttons, checkmark squares, magnifying glass handle highlight, dollar sign curve).
- Three of the 12 cells (cells 1, 6, and 9 - the calculator, checklist, and diagnostic, the three highest-converting formats) have a subtle bright cyan #06B6D4 glow ring around their cell outline at low intensity, telegraphing them as the priority picks.
- Even spacing between cells with comfortable breathing room.
- The entire 4x3 grid is centered horizontally in the lower 60 percent of the cover frame.

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Cover headline lines 1 and 2: large bold sans-serif display face, off-white #FAF9FF, tight letter spacing. Line 1 should read large; line 2 slightly smaller and lighter.
- Subtitle panel: clean medium-weight sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside the off-white panel.
- Top-left pill: condensed mono-spaced face, bright cyan #06B6D4.
- Wordmark: clean light-weight sans-serif, off-white.

Design language:
- Premium editorial cover with a 12-cell icon-grid composition as the topic-specific centerpiece. The grid telegraphs '12 distinct ideas' at a glance.
- Background: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient at 135 degrees, subtle bright cyan bloom upper right.
- Layout: pill + headline + subtitle panel in upper third, the 4x3 icon grid dominates the lower 60 percent, wordmark anchored bottom-left.
- Subtle paper grain texture across the whole frame.
- Echoes the system-illustration approach of P09 Multi-Agent Playbook (a topic-specific central composition that telegraphs the playbook content) with a 12-cell icon library replacing the hexagon network.

Color palette: {palette}.

What to avoid:
- No diagonal cyan accent line crossing the frame (that motif is RETIRED).
- No 'WHAT IS INSIDE' pill grid in the upper area (that motif is RETIRED).
- No funnel composition (P38).
- No concentric rings composition (P37).
- No horizontal stacked-bars composition (P36).
- No vintage ad mockups or fanned card stack composition (P39).
- No flow / arrow / pipeline composition (P35).
- No location-pin network (P40).
- No 5-layer architecture diagram (P50).
- No browser-window mockup, no soundwave, no silhouette of a person.
- No realistic clip art icons (no realistic photographic-style HVAC units, roofs, lawns, plumbing pipes, tools, hammers, wrenches, hard hats).
- No realistic illustrations of houses, garages, decks, windows, solar panels, pools.
- No human figures, no faces, no avatars.
- No emoji icons.
- No Google Maps style visuals.
- No literal brand logos. No real home service company names visible anywhere.
- No text labels inside any of the 12 grid cells. No captions. No category names beneath the icons.

Output: a single high-quality cover image, print-ready, 4K.

hero.prompt:
Wide hero banner for a squeeze page giving away '12 Lead Magnet Ideas for Home Service'. Aspect: 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
- NO rendered text anywhere in the image.
- No font names or typography labels.
- No category names or icon captions of any kind.
- No text labels inside any of the icon-grid cells.

Composition: a 3D-rendered isometric mockup of a US-letter PDF cover floating on the right third, soft drop shadow on a textured editorial background. The PDF cover shows the same 4x3 icon-grid composition from the cover design.

On the left two-thirds: an abstract version of the 12-cell icon-grid motif rendered at low opacity. A subtle 4-column by 3-row arrangement of small rounded-rectangle cards, each containing a simplified off-white #FAF9FF line-art icon (calculator buttons, question mark, calendar grid, magnifying glass, dollar sign, checkmark list, location pin, balance scale, clipboard, eye glyph, leaf, worksheet grid). The grid is at about 25 to 35 percent opacity, becoming a textured backdrop rather than a focal element. Three cells have subtle bright cyan #06B6D4 glow rings around them, the visual focal points of the abstract motif.

Background:
- Top half: deep indigo #1A0B4B fading to electric purple #7C3AED.
- Bottom half: off-white #FAF9FF with faint mesh gradient bloom.
- PDF mockup on the dividing line.
- Subtle paper grain.

Style:
- Premium editorial, restrained.
- No people, no faces, no brand logos, no padlock or shield icons, no realistic photographic-style icons, no realistic illustrations of houses, garages, decks, windows, solar panels, pools, HVAC units, plumbing pipes, tools, hammers, wrenches, hard hats.
- The 12-cell icon-grid is the recurring motif, rendered subtly so the PDF mockup remains the focal point.
- No diagonal cyan accent line. No funnel. No concentric rings. No vintage ad mockup card stack. No location-pin network. No 5-layer architecture. No browser window. No soundwave.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single 4K hero image.

og.prompt:
Open Graph social share card image, 1.91:1 widescreen.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. Contains ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. No font names or typography instructions.
3. Spell every word exactly as written.
4. NO text labels inside any of the icon-grid cells on the right side.

TEXT TO RENDER:
A. Top-left small pill, uppercase: AI BRANDFACTORY
B. Centered massive headline two lines: line 1 reads '12 Lead Magnet Ideas', line 2 reads 'for Home Service'. Line 2 should be smaller than line 1.
C. Below headline, off-white rounded subtitle pill, one line: 12 ready-to-build magnet concepts plus the ideation template for any home service vertical
D. Below subtitle pill, horizontal text strip with middle-dot separators: HVAC · Roofing · Plumbing · Lawn · Pest · Electrical · Deck · Solar · Pool · Windows · Garage Door · Painting
E. Bottom-right small label, faded: files.aibrandfactory.com

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top-left pill: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4.
- Headline line 1: massive bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF.
- Headline line 2: smaller medium-weight sans-serif, off-white at 80% opacity.
- Subtitle: clean medium-weight sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside pill.
- Verticals strip: clean medium-weight sans-serif, bright cyan #06B6D4, smaller size.
- Bottom-right label: clean sans-serif, off-white 70%.

Background: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient at 135 degrees. On the right third, an abstract version of the 12-cell icon-grid motif: a subtle 4-column by 3-row arrangement of small rounded-rectangle cards each containing a simplified off-white #FAF9FF line-art icon (calculator, question mark, timeline bars, comparison scale, location pin, clipboard, worksheet, calendar, magnifying glass, dollar sign, eye, leaf). At about 35 to 45 percent opacity. Two of the cells have soft bright cyan #06B6D4 glow rings around them.

What to avoid:
- No people, no faces, no brand logos, no padlock or shield icons.
- No realistic photographic-style icons (no realistic HVAC units, roofs, lawns, pipes, hammers, wrenches, hard hats, houses).
- No additional text beyond the pieces listed.
- No text labels or captions inside any of the icon-grid cells.
- No reuse of the diagonal cyan accent line motif. No funnel composition (P38). No vintage ad mockup card stack (P39). No concentric rings (P37). No location-pin network (P40). No 5-layer architecture (P50).

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: sharp, ready as og:image.

notion-cover.prompt:
Wide editorial banner for a Notion page header. Aspect 21:9.

CRITICAL CONSTRAINT: NO title, NO headline, NO wordmark, NO logo, NO labels in the corners. NO legible English words anywhere in the image. NO text labels or captions inside any of the icon-grid cells.

Composition:
- Background: deep indigo #1A0B4B on the left fading to electric purple #7C3AED on the right, subtle bright cyan #06B6D4 bloom upper right.
- Across the full frame edge-to-edge, distributed in a wide horizontal arrangement: a long horizontal strip of small rounded-rectangle icon cards. Roughly 16 to 20 cards arranged in a single horizontal row OR a 2-row by 8-to-10-column wide grid arrangement, filling the full banner width.
- Each card contains a simple off-white #FAF9FF line-art icon: variations of calculator, question mark in circle, timeline bars, comparison scale, location pin with document, clipboard with checkmarks, worksheet grid, calendar grid, magnifying glass with branching line, dollar sign in circle, eye glyph, leaf or season glyph. The 12 distinct icon types repeat across the wider arrangement.
- Roughly 4 to 5 cards scattered across the banner have soft bright cyan #06B6D4 glow rings around them as visual focal points.
- Card outlines are thin bright cyan at low opacity. Card fills are deep indigo with subtle inner gradient.
- The arrangement feels like a 'library' of small lead-magnet types laid out in a horizontal display case.
- Subtle paper grain across the entire banner.

What to avoid:
- No corner text. No wordmark. No logos.
- No brand logos of any kind.
- No legible English text or labels anywhere.
- No realistic photographic-style icons (no realistic HVAC units, roofs, lawns, plumbing pipes, hammers, wrenches, hard hats, houses).
- No realistic illustrations of houses, garages, decks, windows, solar panels, pools.
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No diagonal accent line crossing the frame.
- No padlock or shield icons.
- No funnel composition (P38). No concentric rings composition (P37). No vintage ad mockup card stack (P39). No location-pin network composition (P40). No 5-layer architecture composition (P50).

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 4K cinematic banner.
